JUSTICE MINI PUSHKARNA ORDER % 21.04.2026 CS(OS) 347/2026 & I.A. 10807/2026 1. Let the plaint be registered as suit. 2. Issue summons. Summons is accepted by learned counsel appearing for the defendant. 3. Learned counsel for the defendant, at the outset, submits that the defendant is the father of the plaintiff and is already 94 years of age. He, thus, submits that the matter be referred to mediation. 4. Issue notice in I.A. 10807/2026. Notice is accepted by learned counsel for the defendant. 5. In view of the submission by learned counsel for the defendant, and no objection from the plaintiff, this Court deems it appropriate to refer the matter to mediation. 6. Since the matter is being referred to mediation, no direction for filing written statement or the reply to I.A. 10807/2026 is being given for the time Page 1 of 2 This is a digitally signed order. The authenticity of the order can be re-verified from Delhi High Court Order Portal by scanning the QR code shown above. The Order is downloaded from the DHC Server on 23/04/2026 at 21:36:00 being. 7. Accordingly, with the consent of the parties, the matter is referred to the Delhi High Court Mediation and Conciliation Centre, to be listed before the learned Mediator on 30th April, 2026. 8. List before the Court on 20th July, 2026. 9. A copy of this order shall be sent to Delhi High Court Mediation and Conciliation Centre, forthwith.
